summary: Tested 2-step CV flow in Re'Actif Pro. Backend and frontend working correctly: Step 1 (analyze-text) completes fast without CV generation, Step 2 (generate-models) accepts model_types list and generates only selected models. All features verified.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/cv/analyze-text starts fast analysis without CV generation
GET /api/cv/analyze/status returns step and result when completed
POST /api/cv/generate-models returns 404 when no CV analyzed
POST /api/cv/generate-models returns 400 for empty model_types list
POST /api/cv/generate-models returns 400 for all invalid model types
POST /api/cv/generate-models accepts model_types list and starts generation
GET /api/cv/generate-models/status returns job_id, status, progress, total, current_model
GET /api/cv/models returns only generated models (classique: 6461 chars, mixte: 7587 chars, others: 0)
Analysis completes in ~10-15s without CV generation (fast Step 1)
Generation for 2 models completes in ~15-20s (Step 2 on-demand)
frontend_ui_tests: CV upload input found with data-testid='cv-upload-input'
Analysis progress indicator (data-testid='cv-upload-progress') shows timer and steps
CV models section (data-testid='cv-models-section') appears after analysis
4 model toggle cards found (cv-model-classique, cv-model-competences, cv-model-fonctionnel, cv-model-mixte)
Model selection with checkboxes works correctly
Generate button (data-testid='cv-generate-btn') disabled when no models selected
Generate button shows count '(2)' when 2 models selected
Model selection UI shows 'Générer vos CV avec Claude IA' header

two_step_flow.description: 2-step process: 1) Fast analysis 2) On-demand CV generation

step1_fast_analysis.description: POST /api/cv/analyze-text does NOT generate CV models (analysis only, fast)
step1_fast_analysis.evidence: Models endpoint returns empty models {} after analysis

step2_model_generation.description: POST /api/cv/generate-models accepts model_types list and generates selected models
step2_model_generation.evidence: Generated classique (6461 chars) and mixte (7587 chars), competences and fonctionnel remain 0

model_selection_ui.description: Frontend shows model selection grid with checkboxes after analysis
model_selection_ui.evidence: 4 model cards with toggles, count display, Generate (2) button

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _run_cv_analysis correctly stores cv_text in db.cv_texts for later generation (line 82-87)
Backend: POST /cv/generate-models correctly validates model_types and generates in sequence (lines 221-253)
Backend: generate-models/status correctly returns progress, total, current_model (lines 256-262)
Frontend: toggleGenModel correctly manages selectedGenModels state (lines 697-700)
Frontend: generateSelectedModels polls status and updates genProgress (lines 703-739)
Frontend: CV_MODELS_CONFIG defines 4 models with icons and colors (lines 496-501)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use anonymous auth and CV text upload
context_for_next_testing_agent: 2-step CV flow fully tested. Step 1 (analyze-text) is fast and stores CV text in db.cv_texts. Step 2 (generate-models) generates only selected models using Claude AI. Progress endpoint returns current/total/current_model. Frontend correctly shows model selection grid after analysis with checkboxes and Generate button showing count. All data-testid attributes present and working.
